examples.detection_note: No executable code blocks detected (999 data-only blocks found). Site may use non-standard code rendering that the auditor does not recognize, or all examples are in data formats (YAML/JSON).

samples_with_last_updated.hint: ISO timestamp when the workflow was last updated

top_findings: Link verification inconclusive for 520 URLs (auth/rate-limit/server block); these are excluded from broken-link counts.
Example reliability: 0% on 1264 pages (likely detection limitation). Site may use JS-rendered code blocks.
Freshness visibility is weak: only 1.66% pages show last updated

analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of docs.n8n.io covered 1264 pages with 100% crawl coverage and 86.4% overall confidence. Critical issue: 3556 confirmed broken internal documentation links across the site. API reference coverage is 77.78% with 81 API pages detected. Example code reliability shows 0% detection (likely a technical limitation due to JavaScript rendering). Only 1.66% of pages display last-updated timestamps, severely limiting freshness visibility.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage achieved: 1264 of 1264 pages in scope examined (100%)
High overall audit confidence at 86.4% with strong crawl confidence at 95%
API reference documentation present with 81 pages detected and 77.78% coverage
No repository navigation broken links (0 repo_broken_links_count)
SEO/geo issue rate very low at 0.26%
risks: 3556 confirmed broken internal documentation links create severe user navigation and trust issues
520 unverified links due to authentication, rate-limiting, or server blocks may hide additional broken links
Example code reliability at 0% across all 1264 pages indicates detection failure or absence of working examples
Only 1.66% last-updated coverage prevents users from assessing content freshness and relevance
Example detection limitation flagged: JavaScript-rendered code blocks likely not captured by audit tooling
High volume of broken links (3556) suggests systemic content migration, refactoring, or maintenance debt
Unverified links (520) represent unknown risk exposure that could not be validated during audit

prioritized_actions.action: Execute broken link remediation campaign: audit and fix all 3556 confirmed broken internal documentation links
Implement last-updated timestamps on all documentation pages to achieve >90% freshness visibility
Investigate and resolve 520 unverified links (authentication/rate-limit issues) to eliminate unknown risk
Validate example code rendering: confirm if 0% detection is tooling limitation or missing examples, then remediate
Increase API reference coverage from 77.78% to >95% by documenting missing endpoints or improving detection

limitations: Example code reliability at 0% likely reflects audit tool inability to parse JavaScript-rendered code blocks, not actual absence of examples
520 unverified links could not be validated due to authentication requirements, rate limiting, or server blocking; actual status unknown
External audit cannot verify accuracy, correctness, or completeness of documentation content, only structural and technical health
Crawl limited to 1264 of 5790 requested pages due to 5000-page maximum; some content may be unexamined
